acceptanceReviewed.criterion: A qd report-check line-budget script or check rejects scripts/qd-report-check/*.sh and scripts/qd-reports-check.sh files over 350 lines.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/line-budget.sh enforces the 350-line default budget for scripts/qd-reports-check.sh and scripts/qd-report-check/*.sh. evidence/m4-qd-report-check-line-budget-gate/negative-smoke-oversized-checker.log proves an oversized temporary checker file is rejected.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: The new line-budget check runs in the normal just check path on Linux and macOS-capable environments.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh calls the new validation function, and justfile already runs just qd-reports-check inside check. evidence/m4-qd-report-check-line-budget-gate/just-check.log records the integrated Linux path passing.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Current qd report-check files pass the new budget without changing validation behavior.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-check-line-budget-gate/line-budget-check.log records every current qd report-check shell file below 350 lines, and evidence/m4-qd-report-check-line-budget-gate/just-qd-reports-check.log records qd report validation passing.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and a temporary oversized checker-file negative smoke.
No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The completion report claims Linux command validation only and marks realWorldValidation not_required.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
